_note: User unsent (deleted for everyone) a message they previously sent. 'unsend.messageId' identifies the original message — use it to locate and delete any stored copy. No replyToken — cannot reply to an unsend event. The original message content cannot be retrieved after this event fires. LINE guidelines recommend respecting the user's intent: delete or make inaccessible any stored copy of the unsent content. Fires in both 1-on-1 and group/room contexts.
